title: Biome Additions
description: Extra decorations for biomes. Highly compatible, survival friendly.
body:
Biome Additions is discontinued. Check out its successor, [Wilderness](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wilderness_).

Biome Additions was a biome enhancement datapack that focused on improving biomes in a survival friendly way. The pack primarily adds features to existing biomes, but also modifies several features. Due to its Feature Addition System, it is highly compatible with other worldgen packs and mods. It works well with [Better Trees](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-trees) and [Extreme Hills & Mountains](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/extreme-hills-5391332/).
